title: pimelea spinescens subsp. spinescens
intro: Pimelea spinescens subsp. spinescens, also known as prickly pimelea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Thymelaeaceae, native to eastern Australia. The leaves and stems of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can aid in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Pimelea spinescens subsp. spinescens are believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting infection, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be applied topically to the skin to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
